description: Aibrust utilizes Web3 technology to enhance secure medical data collection, enabling rapid multi-site research and incentivized data access for healthcare providers.
An immersive blockchain gaming ecosystem where players collect, breed, and battle fantasy creatures—powered by play-to-earn mechanics and true digital ownership.
Apertum empowers users with full control over their digital assets, offering Web3 solutions for DApps, gaming, NFTs, and more.

Artery Chain is the next-generation Layer 1 blockchain built on Avalanche, specially engineered for AI-powered, immersive Web3 gaming. Artery Chain uniquely integrates rich storytelling, compelling game-first mechanics, and advanced AI systems to revolutionize decentralized gaming worlds.
The Contract Chain (C-Chain) runs on an Ethereum Virtual Machine and is used to deploy smart contracts and connect to dApps.
Permissionless prediction markets. Bet on anything. Powered by memes, fueled by belief.
An opinionated chain built for gaming.
Layer 1 blockchain powering streaming.

Blitz.gg is a gaming companion app that provides real-time insights and analytics for several popular online games like League of Legends, Valorant, and Teamfight Tactics. The app offers game-specific stats, build guides, counters, and personalized advice to improve gameplay. 

The Avalance L1 is the heart behind our subscription, in-game currency, Blitz Battle Rewards, Marketplace and more!

The Blockticity L1 serves as the verification layer for digital conformity assessment in global trade. It ensures that trade documents are tamper-evident, standards-aligned, and AI-verifiable. Blockticity issues blockchain-secured Certificates of Authenticity (COAs) to verify the origin, handling, and compliance of real-world assets (RWAs) across global supply chains. Powered by our AI engine, CoAi, and integrated with LayerZero interoperability, the Blockticity L1 enables intelligent document validation and composable trust infrastructure for AI-native trade authentication.
A 5v5 tactical Hero-Shooter game, integrated with blockchain.
The Binary Network integrates any dApp, on any chain inside telecommunication apps. Put your project in front of 169 million users.

Cloudverse is an enterprise-level metaverse platform powered by Alibaba Cloud and the Avalanche ecosystem, managed by MUA DAO. It provides a robust metaverse solution for businesses, supported by a skilled team in crypto, architecture, asset management, and game development, ensuring continuous expansion and compatibility with various devices.
A fast, secure, and customizable Layer 1 blockchain built specifically for the automotive industry.

Coqnet is a Layer-1 blockchain within the Avalanche ecosystem, designed to empower memecoin communities. It combines Avalanche's robust infrastructure with a unique identity and features tailored to support vibrant communities, innovative developers, and dedicated validators.

The CX Chain L1 powers a new frontier in on-chain gaming, purpose-built on Avalanche to merge game execution, liquidity, and fairness into a single decentralized layer. By removing intermediaries and embedding audited randomness and automated payouts directly into the protocol, CX Chain enables a trustless environment where anyone can become a house, delegate capital, or launch games. With native staking, community ownership, and a growing suite of smart-contract games, CX Chain redefines what it means to play, build, and earn in Web3—making liquidity, not just gameplay, a core part of the experience.

D-Chain is a private blockchain with an unique architecture that offers high performance and scalability for corporates. Doğuş Teknoloji which created the D-Chain is a leading technology company specializing in Generative AI, Data Analytics, System Integration, CRM/ERP solutions, Cybersecurity, IoT, and Web/Mobile Technologies, offering innovative solutions for both local and global markets.
Real world assets, tokenised, structured and supported.

DeBoard is a platform that strengthens real economies and promotes open trade in casual games. Built on the AVAX L1, it allows gamers to own and trade in-game items without crypto wallets, offering token presale opportunities instead of a node sale.
Avalanche native AI agent framework powered by Agent Intelligence Protocol (AIP).

The Dexalot Exchange EVM subnet is a revolutionary decentralized exchange aiming at bringing the traditional centralized exchange look and feel, through a decentralized on-chain application. Dexalot users can trade crypto securely and efficiently, with no slippage or custody risk. It is built on Avalanche L1 technology, the most effective scaling solution in the blockchain industry.

The vision for the DFK Avalanche L1 is to become the go-to location for community members and projects to launch GameFi and other blockchain gaming experiences in conjunction with the primary offering of DeFi Kingdoms: Crystalvale.
The Dinari Financial Network is the hub for the issuance, trading, settlement, and clearing of tokenized securities and other financial instruments.

DOS Chain is an Avalanche L1 designed for high-throughput decentralized applications (dApps), offering near-instant finality and ultra-low fees. It combines EVM compatibility with a unique distributed operating system model, making it ideal for scalable DeFi, gaming, and enterprise solutions.

EMDx brings institutional-grade trading to Avalanche with a decentralized perpetuals exchange. Offering deep liquidity, up to 50x leverage, and near-zero slippage, it combines the efficiency of CEXs with the self-custody ethos of DeFi—no compromises.
Data-based Basket ETFs for simple US-market exposure and yield solutions for retail investors.

EVEN is more than just a platform; it's a community that thrives on the direct connection between artists and their fans. It revolutionizes the way fans can support their favorite artists and how artists can give back to their most loyal fans.

Feature is an entertainment studio and tech company pioneering storytelling’s evolution. We transform fans’ experiences with Smart Content, turning passive consumption into active participation, linking audiences with creators, brands, studios, and content

The FIFA Blockchain is the dedicated Layer 1 powering FIFA’s official Web3 ecosystem.
It enables fast, low-cost, and scalable transactions for all FIFA digital products — from collectibles and ticketing to on-chain games and fan rewards. Designed with EVM compatibility, it offers full flexibility for developers while ensuring a secure and seamless experience for users. By integrating digital assets directly into the world of football, the FIFA Blockchain unlocks new ways for fans to engage, collect, and participate in the football ecosystem.

FRQTAL is a web3 ecosystem on Avalanche focused on mass adoption, enabling users to store value via FNFTs (Fractional NFTs) and share content directly through wallet profiles. It prioritizes accessibility, ownership, and open participation—bridging the gap between crypto natives and mainstream users.
Purpose-driven blockchain built on Avalanche for mental wealth, transparency, and regnerative care.

The Green Dot L1 is an EVM-compatible blockchain which supports Deloitte assets, including Close As You Go (CAYG), a secure cloud-based software platform built to help agencies manage recovery documentation for procurement and contracting, model policies and procedures, and plan for disaster.
India’s Biggest Incentivised Wellness Platform. Our vision is to motivate individual and families to adopt an active and healthy lifestyle.

Gunzilla Games is a AAA game studio pushing blockchain integration into high-fidelity shooters. Built on Avalanche, its flagship titles blend immersive gameplay with true asset ownership through NFTs, bridging triple-A and web3 gaming economies.
Hashfire converts any contract into an on-chain, verifiable agreement with built-in payment logic and real-time financing options.

Hatchyverse is a community-owned IP ecosystem on Avalanche, where the Hatchy brand and its characters are governed by a DAO. Fans and creators collectively steer the franchise—from NFT collectibles to games—ensuring a truly decentralized, fan-driven universe.

The Henesys L1 drives the MapleStory Universe, a groundbreaking expansion of Nexon's iconic MapleStory franchise. MapleStory Universe is an innovative virtual world ecosystem that leverages thepower of blockchain technology to deliver a truly immersive and dynamic experience. By integrating digital scarcity, open ecosystems, and MapleStory NFTs at its core, it creates a revolutionary platform that promises to redefine the future of gaming and digital ownership.
HighOctane is the mainnet subnet for Gold Fever, a thrilling survival MMORPG where you can mine and fight for $NGL in a decentralized blockchain economy driven by #CommercialNFTs owners.
A Layer 1 for a Perps OrderBook DEX
A play-to-earn hunting game with teams, memes, and rewards.
Innovo Markets Network powering markets.

IntainNFT is revolutionizing structured finance with blockchain technology, offering a digital platform for issuing, trading, and managing assets via NFTs. It focuses on simplifying and securing complex financial processes, offering transparency and efficiency in asset management.

Intersect is a platform that connects Web3 technology with real-world applications. It offers a unique journey for users, featuring campaigns, exclusive rewards, and airdrops. The platform is preparing for future campaigns, including staking and racing, designed to bring users into the next level of Web3 experiences.

Kalichain offers a blockchain solution for product authenticity through tokenization, enabling secure and transparent transactions. With tools like NFC tag verification and smart contracts, it supports businesses across industries. The platform also features KALIPAY for secure transactions and decentralized governance for seamless cross-chain interoperability.

The Koroshi L1 powers the entire Koroshi ecosytem, composed of Koroshi Gaming and Koroshi Studio. Koroshi Studio features a dynamic NFT collection and a competitive gaming platform designed to captivate both casual participants and hardcore gamers.

The LAMINA1 Mainnet — a platform and protocol for a new era of digital content and co-creation founded by legendary author/futurist Neal Stephenson, crypto pioneer Peter Vessenes, and entertainment executive Rebecca Barkin.
The Lamina1 Identity subnet provides decentralized identity services to the Lamina1 platform and wider Avalanche ecosystem.
Providing a fast affordable way to access and prepare for the cost of private healthcare.
Loco Legends is India's first NFT marketplace for eSports that will mint streamer collectibles with online and offline perks

The World's Personal Data Network

Masa is architecting the “decentralized Google” for the AI era. We are building an open, incentivized, and privacy-by-default economy for the world's personal data.
The Meld Subnet is one of the key pieces of the MELD protocol. It supports the smart contracts and operations of the financial products developed by MELD in a composable, interoperable way.
Memoria is the first decentralized AI Gaming and AI Agent concept platform, seamlessly merging AI-driven gaming with meme culture.

Mintera is a platform that integrates blockchain technology to enhance societal efficiency. It creates a tokenized ecosystem designed to improve resource management and productivity across various industries.

Mirai Labs builds consumer apps that transform complex ideas into intuitive experiences, focusing on practical innovation. They aim to entertain and provide innovative, user-friendly products in the crypto and fintech space.
MUGEN mainnet

Numbers Protocol is a decentralized system ensuring digital media authenticity and ownership. It offers tools for content verification, blockchain-based provenance, and AI-driven solutions to increase trust in digital assets. By providing decentralized storage and low-cost infrastructure, it helps creators protect ownership, monetize work, and ensures transparency in content sharing.

NUMINE serves as a Web 3.0 gaming platform that functions as a chain and ecosystem, allowing content developers and users to collectively influence the direction of the industry.
NUMNE offers an effective and convenient solution for developers seeking high-quality content and users desiring an optimal blockchain experience.

OMOCHI Chain: Private Chain where only Validators can view and utilize data. Data written on OMOCHI Chain is communicated to ONIGIRI Chain via Avalanche Warp Messaging without public exposure. Validators on ONIGIRI Chain receive $ONGR rewards.

ONIGIRI Chain is a blockchain platform focused on storing and collecting food and healthcare data. By centralizing consumer behavior information, it aims to become the leading protocol for these sectors, facilitating new value creation.

Orange L1 is The Creator Network. Purpose-built for AI-native creators, Orange provides the tools to turn AI-assisted and vibe coded ideas into live products, backed by on-chain rewards and an active user ecosystem.
Oumla empowers businesses, developers, and governments with secure, scalable blockchain solutions. Simplify your blockchain journey with our innovative APIs and SDKs
PandaSea is a Layer 1 blockchain and Web3 stack for creating liquid, decentralized marketplaces across digital and real-world asset classes.
PLAYA3ULL GAMES is inspired by gamers and funded by our community. Gaming is changing from being an all consuming time-sink into a brand new asset class! It's time to lock and load!

PlayDapp offers a platform designed to bring Web2 users into the Web3 ecosystem. It enables players to engage in games and transactions without the need for cryptocurrency. Through its SDK, PlayDapp helps developers integrate Web3 elements into traditional apps, fostering interoperability across games, metaverses, and more.

The PLYR gaming chain offers low-cost, fast, and secure transactions for gaming. It enables seamless in-game purchases, asset transfers, and integrates with over 200 networks, providing a robust foundation for innovative and cross-chain gaming experiences.

Pulsar combines game elements of the Real Time Strategy (RTS) genre with a persistent, massively multiplayer online (MMO) world. From the former Tech Director of the whole technology and the New IPs Director of King (Candy Crush Franchise) arrives Pulsar.
Quboid is a dynamic blend of engineering and creative exploration, dedicated to crafting decentralized economies that facilitate seamless value exchange within communities.
QA Mainnet Testing
QR0719T1MS
Build your status with Really’s unique Fandime. Really collectors enjoy access to exclusive content and unforgettable special events in the metaverse.  Download the ReallyAR App to get started.

Rymedi provides blockchain-enabled data management solutions for health organizations, particularly in clinical trials, diagnostics, and testing. The platform streamlines data collection, enhances patient experience, and ensures compliance with global regulations. Its tools enable secure storage, reporting, and integration with labs, promoting efficiency and growth while minimizing risk.

Rymedi provides blockchain-enabled data management solutions for health organizations, particularly in clinical trials, diagnostics, and testing. The platform streamlines data collection, enhances patient experience, and ensures compliance with global regulations. Its tools enable secure storage, reporting, and integration with labs, promoting efficiency and growth while minimizing risk.

Rymedi provides blockchain-enabled data management solutions for health organizations, particularly in clinical trials, diagnostics, and testing. The platform streamlines data collection, enhances patient experience, and ensures compliance with global regulations. Its tools enable secure storage, reporting, and integration with labs, promoting efficiency and growth while minimizing risk.
The Shrapnel Subnet is the default blockchain on Avalanche used for trustworthy, transparent, and interoperable content, commerce, and community for Shrapnel, a AAA FPS extraction shooter.

Subnet LAW for Legends at War is a dedicated blockchain environment designed to enhance the gaming experience for its players. It offers a seamless, high-speed platform for in-game transactions and interactions, ensuring robust security and efficiency. This specialized subnet brings a new level of immersion and connectivity to the Legends at War community, fostering a rich, interactive gaming universe.

Space is Otherworld's subnets, offering distinctive services for the needs of users. Fuel is a specialized token that functions as a lubricant for data transactions and enhances user interaction within Space, enabling seamless transaction.

Step Network is a blockchain built to support lifestyle, fitness, and consumption through a fast, open, and inclusive ecosystem. It leverages Avalanche’s code for scalability and security while offering a decentralized environment free from algorithmic trading bots. The network facilitates the rapid integration of metaverse features and NFT infrastructure, making it accessible to brands, developers, and corporations.

StraitsX offers a payments infrastructure for digital assets, focusing on stablecoins like XUSD, XSGD, and XIDR. It enables seamless transactions between traditional finance and digital assets, with multi-chain support across Ethereum and Binance Smart Chain. The platform also provides services for both individuals and businesses, such as API solutions for payment and payout management.

Swimmer Network Subnet is a custom blockchain built on an Avalanche Subnet, and is home to Crabada, an undersea world filled with fierce fighting Hermit-Crabs called Crabada. The Crabada Idle-Game and marketplace is expected migrate from the C-chain onto the Swimmer Network. Crabada can be bred, and used in games to earn cryptocurrencies with real value
This is the official subnet explorer for the Team Mainnet 1010-1017 Subnet
Purpose-built L1 infrastructure layer for digital marketing and growth applications in Web3 using blockchain technology.
L1 blockchain for indie developers, musicians, visual artists, and players focused on games, art, and creative tools distribution

Tiltyard is a blockchain game studio focused on creating innovative, decentralized gaming experiences. It designs futuristic landscapes and interactive adventures that push the boundaries of gaming. The platform incorporates blockchain technology to offer players a new level of immersive gameplay.
TITAN CONTENT will create next-gen K-pop artists and content, unique fan engagement and experience in virtual/web3 and the real world.

TixChain is a dedicated network that serves as the foundation for the Tixbase ticketing platform. It provides a secure, transparent, and scalable infrastructure for managing ticket transactions and ensuring the authenticity of tickets.

Toki is a platform designed to help businesses build and manage customer loyalty programs. It offers customizable solutions including paid memberships, referral programs, rewards systems, and engagement features like gamification. Toki integrates seamlessly with e-commerce platforms, providing businesses with tools to track performance, offer cashback rewards, and create personalized customer experiences.

TURF is an intent-driven data orchestration protocol that powers on-demand access to structured, high-context data. The network autonomously & intelligently route requests to relevant sources—bringing real-time, semantically aligned data to the agents and models that request for Data.
Decentralised & AI-Smart Health Passport Wallet

UPTN is a Web3.0 Platform where various real world business and lifestyle services can integrate into. We envision UPTN as a tool to enable mass adoption, a gateway platform into Web3.0, and also support various Web2.0 services that want to migrate to Web3.0.
A full-service Layer 1 protocol, game publisher, and growth platform, offering unparalleled support throughout the game lifecycle.
Watr is the infrastructure powering the expansion of commodity trade, financing, and participation—built for institutions, traders, and pioneers shaping the future.

WrapTag enables the digitization of authentic items into NFTs, using NFC tags to track ownership and authenticity on the blockchain. It offers secure, verifiable digital certificates for products, enhancing brand trust and product value. WrapTag's decentralized app allows easy integration of NFTs with physical items, offering unique solutions for collectors and manufacturers alike.

XANA is a Web3 platform focused on creating metaverse experiences with blockchain integration. It allows users to interact in a virtual world with avatars, digital assets, and NFTs, enabling decentralized and immersive gaming and social activities. XANA aims to build a bridge between reality and the metaverse, offering businesses and users opportunities to engage in virtual economy and community-building.

XPLUS is a Web3 toolkit that helps users access blockchain technology, NFTs, and decentralized apps. It aims to unlock the potential of Web3 by providing developers and creators with tools to build and engage in the metaverse.
The first Layer 1 built from the ground up as an agent chain.
The subnet is used to facilitate gas-less transactions for the zeroone platform. A platform that allows users to create, share and collect without having to worry about fees.
